description.ko: 투명한 크리스탈 구조를 통과하며 미니멀한 배경 위로 춤추듯 펼쳐지는 생생한 무지개 빛의 향연을 매혹적으로 탐구합니다.
description.en: A mesmerizing exploration of light passing through crystalline structures, dispersing into a vibrant rainbow spectrum that dances across a minimalist backdrop.

prompt: A macro cinematic shot of a triangular glass prism on a clean white surface, a single beam of sharp white light entering from the side, refracting into a vivid, highly detailed rainbow spectrum on the other side, soft caustic patterns, 8k resolution, ray tracing, ethereal atmosphere, minimalist aesthetic.
